dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 在想予予今天要好好表现。

shots.reasoning_brief: Response dialogue; speaker Niange to child; visible pair; smile implies gentle gaze.
Child's confident reply; visible mother-child; chest out suggests direct address.
Scene transition visual; multiple children/parents circle, teacher center; approx 13 foreground from 'ten several children and parents'.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_TEACHER
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 今天是我们中班的第一天，请小朋友们轮流做自我介绍好不好？先说名字，再说一个关于自己的秘密。

shots.reasoning_brief: Teacher addressing group; listener all children/parents; smile to audience.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 大家好，我叫沈知予。小名予予。

shots.reasoning_brief: Child introduction; addressing class; standing straight implies group gaze.
Teacher questioning specific child; direct listener Zhiyu.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我爸爸是这个城市最厉害的人。但我还没见过他。等我找到他，他会变得很厉害。

shots.reasoning_brief: Child's secret reveal; addressing class thoughtfully.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_TEACHER
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 予予的爸爸一定很了不起。那你有没有什么爱好呢？

shots.reasoning_brief: Teacher's gentle follow-up; listener Zhiyu; pause and gentle tone.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我喜欢画画。还有数学。100以内的加减法我都能算。

shots.reasoning_brief: Child responding to teacher; direct listener.
Quick math answer; context to teacher.
Child's casual follow-up; addressing class.
Visual transition to evening; mother waiting, child running out; no dialogue.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪！今天老师说我是全班最聪明的！还给我多发了一颗小星星！

shots.reasoning_brief: Child excitedly to mother; direct listener.
Mother praising while action on child's backpack; target child.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪，我告诉你一个秘密。

shots.reasoning_brief: Child to mother; secretive tone.
Mother inquiring; direct to child.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我今天在幼儿园走廊上看到一张照片。挂在荣誉墙上。一个穿西装的男人，下面写着'陆氏集团总裁陆景琛先生捐赠'。妈咪——就是医院的那个叔叔！

shots.reasoning_brief: Child whispering secret to mother; photo mentioned but no handoff; listener mother.
Mother's evasive response; no prop continuity from photo as it's not held.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我就知道！他就住在这个城市！妈咪，你今天不是去他上班的地方了吗？你有没有看到他？

shots.reasoning_brief: Child excited questioning mother.
Mother changing topic; action implies standing and holding hand.
